scope.target: English physical card_print rows without active card_print_species mappings
scope.purpose: Separate real species enrichment debt from trainer/energy/non-Pokemon rows where species is not applicable.

governance_recommendation.summary: Do not treat every missing card_print_species row as enrichment debt. Species applies to Pokemon subjects, not trainer, energy, object, or checklist utility cards.
governance_recommendation.next_action: No species write package is currently ready. Consider adding a species_applicability status/reporting layer so not-applicable rows stop appearing as unresolved debt.
blocked_apply_reasons: not_applicable rows should not receive species links.
unknown_until_traits rows need trait/source enrichment first.
maybe_applicable rows need deterministic rule or seed adjudication before insert.
